violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply to certify Food Safety Manager with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

Everything mini bagels, which has sesame seed, observed stored on top drawer of Delfield 10 cooler. Proper storage of foods containing allergens reviewed. Staff moved the everything mini bagels to bottom drawer cooler during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
